title: Claude Memory Lifecycle: Connection-Based Memory Management for Claude Code
description: A cognitive layer for Claude Code that implements biological memory principles — entries that connect to other knowledge survive, isolated ones fade. Built entirely with hooks, using local embeddings (Qwen3-0.6B ONNX) and Gemini Flash Lite for quality assurance. Features a 6-stage lifecycle (buffer → connections → clusters → consolidation → routing → aging), automatic noise filtering, diamond protection for high-value memories, and cross-system conflict detection.
